title: Lively Italian Guanciale Spaghetti Amatriciana
description: A nutty, crisp, quick-fix Italian dish featuring lettuce, soffritto-base, and dash-friendly Amatriciana form.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook the guanciale over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the cooked guanciale from the skillet and set it aside on a paper towel-lined plate.
In the same skillet, add the sliced onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and red pepper flakes to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the canned tomatoes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked guanciale back into the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine.
Stir in the Parmesan cheese and cook until melted.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with the shredded lettuce.
